nodes.name: Planner Prompt
nodes.notes: Builds the planner prompt. No data fetched yet.

nodes.name: Ollama Planner
nodes.notes: LLM decides which tools are needed. Only call — stays focused on routing.

nodes.name: Parse Tool List
nodes.notes: Parses LLM JSON. Extracts needsStatus / needsTemp / needsDisk flags for IF routing.

nodes.name: Collect Data
nodes.notes: Waits for all 3 branches (status/temp/disk). Each always produces one item — either real data or a skip marker.

nodes.name: Normalize Metrics
nodes.notes: Converts raw API responses into compact structured JSON. This is what the Analyzer LLM receives — no raw Proxmox blobs.

nodes.name: Analyzer Prompt
nodes.notes: Anomaly detection is done in JS. LLM only writes the causal narrative under 60 words.

nodes.name: Ollama Analyzer
nodes.notes: Second LLM call — focused only on causal analysis of pre-flagged anomalies.

nodes.name: Format Response
nodes.notes: Builds the final Telegram message. Flags are listed deterministically; LLM analysis is appended underneath.
